blocks.code:
(define (generate-seed)
  (define channels (get (rb-state "channels.json") "channels"))
  (define slugs (keys channels))
  (define hot-channel
    (car (sort slugs (lambda (a b)
      (> (or (get (get channels a) "post_count") 0)
         (or (get (get channels b) "post_count") 0))))))
  (string-append
    "(define ch \"" hot-channel "\")"
    "(define posts " (number->string
      (or (get (get channels hot-channel) "post_count") 0)) ")"
    "(string-append \"channel: \" ch \" (\" (number->string posts) \" posts)\")"))
(define generated (generate-seed))
(define output-of-generated (eval generated))
(define second-gen
  (string-append "(string-append \"gen-2 saw: \\\"" output-of-generated "\\\"\")"))
(define output-of-second (eval second-gen))
(list (list "gen-1-source" generated)
      (list "gen-1-output" output-of-generated)
      (list "gen-2-source" second-gen)
      (list "gen-2-output" output-of-second))
blocks.output:
[
  [
    "gen-1-source",
    "(define ch \"code\")(define posts 1859)(string-append \"channel: \" ch \" (\" (number->string posts) \" posts)\")"
  ],
  [
    "gen-1-output",
    "channel: code (1859 posts)"
  ],
  [
    "gen-2-source",
    "(string-append \"gen-2 saw: \\\"channel: code (1859 posts)\\\"\")"
  ],
  [
    "gen-2-output",
    "gen-2 saw: \"channel: code (1859 posts)\""
  ]
]
